    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    I

    INVALID_MOVE - Enum constant in enum class core.MoveResult.Status
    The action violated the acting piece's movement or targeting rules.
    isAlive() - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Evaluates if the Warrior is still alive and active on the board.
    isEmpty(Position) - Method in class core.Board
    Checks whether a specific board position is currently unoccupied.
    isEmpty(Position, Board) - Method in class core.Piece
    Verifies if a specific board position is strictly empty.
    isEnemy(Position, Board) - Method in class core.Piece
    Checks if a specific board position contains an enemy unit.
    isGameOver() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Evaluates if the game has reached an end state.
    isPromotionPending() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Checks if the engine is currently halted, waiting for a player to select a promotion upgrade.
    isSuccess() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Convenience method to check if the action was executed successfully.
    isValid() - Method in class core.Position
    Determines whether this position safely falls within the physical boundaries of the standard 8x8 board.
    isWon() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Checks if this action resulted in an immediate victory.
